step_by_step_thinking:
**Clinical Reasoning:**
PPV-23 (pneumococcal polysaccharide vaccine) is particularly important for individuals with increased susceptibility to invasive pneumococcal disease, especially among those with compromised immune systems or structural abnormalities predisposing them to frequent infections. Among the options presented—Cystic fibrosis patient, Sickle cell anemia patient, patient with recurrent rhinitis and sinusitis, child less than 2 years—the **child under 2 years** would likely face more significant challenges both because of immature immune system development and potential comorbidities requiring heightened protection from infectious diseases.
\boxed{\text{D}}
